emails.subject: Concert
emails.body: Concert Suzanne: Can you find out when Madonna will be in Philly? We will be there from 6/30 through 7/4 and I was hoping that she would be there at that time. Can you check for her dates in NY or DC as well? Thanks. Carol St. Clair EB 3889 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax) carol.st.clair@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Concert
emails.body: Re: Concert Here's the web page with her schedule on it. It looks like it's going to be the end of July. <URL> inorCATID=1 Carol St Clair 05/31/2001 09:20 AM
